subject: Re: Boieng boost pump update
body:
Now #1 pump is cavitating along with #2 popping breaker, and fuel shut off valve in Aux tank not working, we feel the bladder has collapsed or a rag in the aux tank,,seems this problem is getting worse. It was operating normal when we did our first test flight after C check.
Flight Star in Jax can start working plane Sunday or Monday morning at latest.
I can disarm Aux fuel tank and bring you to St. Thomas if you like or go straight to Jax to let them start opening tank, its a 13min flight from Lake City FL where I'm located now to Jacksonville (Flight Star).
Pls advise
Lv
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Date: Fri, 30 May 2008 21:21:33 
To:LVJET@aol.com
Subject: Re: Boieng boost pump update


keep me up

 
----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Sent: Saturday, May 31, 2008 12:09:16 AM
Subject: Boieng boost pump update

 
boost pumb arrives at 2pm at Timco maintenance facility 
should be completed by 4pm and we should arrive in EWR Newark by 7pm 
if all goes well we could have wheel up at 8pm if you like? 
weather is not perfect in LSJ according to radar photo, showers and scattered thungderstormss.\ 
lv
